title: Tetouan, Tanger-Tétouan-Al Hoceïma — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tetouan, Tanger-Tétouan-Al Hoceïma: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tetouan is a city in Tanger-Tétouan-Al Hoceïma with a population of 380,000. A mountain-fringed city in northern Morocco, known for its whitewashed medina and strong Andalusian heritage.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
